description.unified: Throws a spear at the furthest enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG and drawing the enemy in front of the hero. Then deals ??? P.DMG to enemies in range, stunning them for [1 sec->3 sec].
Upon blocking enemy attack for [5 sec->15 sec], triggers a shockwave that deals ??? P.DMG to enemies in range, reducing their ATK by [22%->20%].

Upon DMG block during casting, jump attack DMG is increased by [8%->7%]. Also, deals ??? P.DMG to enemy and inflicts stun. After casting, jumps and attacks the enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG and stunning them for [1 sec->4 sec]. Gains immunity to CC while the skill is in use.
All allies' P.DEF is increased by ??? and P.Block chance is increased by [120->250].

IV.unified: Stun duration is increased by [0.5 sec->2 sec].

light.unified: In exchange for [1000->1] additional Mana Cost, pull in 2 enemies.

dark.unified: All pulled enemies take 25% increased DMG from all sources for 10 sec.

light.unified: Deals extra P.DMG based on P.DEF.

dark.unified: Ally P.DEF is boosted by [15%->20%] for [5 sec->10 sec] after activation.
While casting, all allies take [30%->20%] reduced P.DMG.

light.unified: P.DEF is increased by [50%->20%] and P. Block is boosted by 50%.

dark.unified: Recovers HP equal to 40% of P.DEF upon blocking.

description.unified: [Will to Win] Increases DMG by 50% and P.Weakness of the target by {0}% for [5 sec->10 sec].
[Steel Fortress] Mana cost is reduced by 1 and jump attack's Stun duration is increased by {0} sec.
[Spearhead] Increases DEF boost by 50%. All allies have their P.Crit Resistance increased by {0}.

dark.unified: At the beginning of every battle, decrease the ATK of all enemies by [15%->20%] for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Increases P.DEF of all allies by {0}%. Blocking an enemy attack has a {1}% chance to recover {2}[Mana->%] Mana and reduce Cooldown of all skills by 1 sec.

Summons the soul of The Blue Light Arpheus, increasing all allies's P.Crit Resistance by [(added) 300] and P.Block Chance by [???->300] for 10 sec. Afterward, places [Mana Source of Blue Light] around self for 10 sec. For the duration of [Mana Source of Blue Light], deals a total of ??? P.DMG to enemies within range over [every 1 sec->9 times] and reduces their Mana by [(added) 300]. At the end of duration, creates an explosion that deals ??? P.DMG and silences enemies within range for [3 sec->5 sec].

1.from: Allies within [Mana Source of Blue Light] recover {2} Mana every sec.
1.to: Allies within [Mana Source of Blue Light] have their ATK Spd increased by 300 and recover 300 Mana every sec.
1.unified: Allies within [Mana Source of Blue Light] have their ATK Spd increased by [(added) 300] and recover [???->300] Mana every sec.

2.from: Changes the Silence duration applied at the end of [Mana Source of Blue Light] to 4.5 sec.
2.to: Continuously dispels positive effects placed upon enemies that are within [Mana Source of Blue Light] and changes the duration of Silence to 8 sec.
2.unified: Continuously dispels positive effects placed upon enemies that are within [Mana Source of Blue Light] and changes the duration of Silence to [4.5 sec->8 sec].
